reasoning:
Apex Infrastructure Pvt Ltd meets all four mandatory qualification requirements for Tender HB-07. Average annual turnover of Rs. 43.7 Cr exceeds the Rs. 30 Cr threshold. Three completed road construction projects (including two above Rs. 10 Cr) satisfy the experience requirement. ISO 9001:2015 certification is current. Net worth of Rs. 18.4 Cr clears the Rs. 15 Cr floor.

The recommendation is REVIEW rather than BID because the tender document references a prior KRDCL contract (Package HB-04) awarded to another vendor in 2022 with a satisfactory completion certificate — a signal of incumbent advantage. With an incumbent risk score of 71 (threshold: 70), this is a marginal call. The decision to bid should depend on whether the team has a direct relationship with KRDCL procurement officials and whether HB-04's vendor is likely to rebid.

No evidence gaps were detected. All qualification claims in the company profile are backed by documented project completions with performance certificates.
